home.subtitle: A simple, powerful web tool that makes managing your Palworld dedicated servers effortless
home.featuresSubtitle: An all-in-one solution for every Palworld server management need
home.ctaSubtitle: Create your first Palworld server now and kick off an amazing gaming experience

serverMgmt.title: Server Management
serverMgmt.desc: Start, stop, and restart your Palworld servers with one click

modMgmt.title: Mod Management
modMgmt.desc: Easily install and manage mods via the Steam Workshop

monitor.title: Real-time Monitoring
monitor.desc: Monitor server status, performance metrics, and player activity

security.title: Secure & Reliable
security.desc: JWT authentication and secure server management APIs

deploy.title: One-click Deployment
deploy.desc: Automated installation of SteamCMD and server files

i18n.title: Multi-language Support
i18n.desc: Available in Chinese, English, and Japanese

dashboard.subtitle: Manage your Palworld server world
dashboard.empty: No servers yet — create your first one and start your Palworld journey!

servers.title: Servers
servers.name: Server Name
servers.empty: No servers yet. Create your first server to get started.
servers.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this server?

serverManage.comingSoonDesc: This feature is under development. The layout is reserved — stay tuned.

overview.title: Server overview
overview.desc: Server info, runtime metrics and online player list

players.title: Players & save data
players.desc: View player, guild, Pal and inventory data

unban.label: Unban player
unban.placeholder: Enter the user ID to unban

save.noSave: No save found (server not installed or no save generated yet)

operations.title: Operations
operations.desc: Broadcast, save, graceful shutdown and immediate stop
operations.shutdownMessagePlaceholder: Message shown to players before shutdown (optional)
operations.stopDesc: Stop the server immediately without a countdown.

confirm.shutdownDesc: The server will shut down after the countdown, broadcasting a notice to players.
confirm.stopDesc: The server will stop immediately and players will be disconnected at once.

rest.settingsHint: Open Server settings to set AdminPassword, then restart the server.

reason.not_running: The server is not running. Start it first.
reason.admin_password_empty: AdminPassword is empty; REST API cannot be used.
reason.unreachable: Could not reach the server REST API. Check the port and configuration.

backup.title: Save sync & backups
backup.desc: Scheduled save sync, auto backup and backup management

save.metaOnly: Server not installed — only basic info is saved

basicsSection.desc: Server name, port, passwords and REST API

gameSection.desc: Performance, management, gameplay and balance settings

rawSection.desc: Edit the raw OptionSettings line directly

modsSection.desc: Manage Workshop mods and sign in to Steam

addServer.title: Add New Server
addServer.pathHint: Leave empty to use the default path

modLibrary.title: Mod Library
modLibrary.desc: Global mod repository — manage Steam Workshop mod downloads and updates in one place
modLibrary.removeConfirm: Remove this mod from the library? All server references will be unlinked and deployed files removed. This cannot be undone.
modLibrary.empty: Library is empty. Click "Add Mod" or "Browse Workshop" to get started.

serverConfig.title: Server Config
serverConfig.notInstalledHint: Server files are not installed; install the server before editing config.
serverConfig.rawHint: Edit the raw OptionSettings line. Saving raw overrides the structured form.
serverConfig.rawModeActive: Raw text mode active: saving will use the raw OptionSettings line.

basics.name: Server name
basics.pathChangedHint: Directory changed. Save will re-check whether server files exist there.

mods.hint: Select downloaded mods from the library, then click "Deploy mods" to copy them to the server directory.
mods.empty: No mods linked yet. Click "Add from Library".
mods.restartNeeded: Mod changes take effect after restarting the server.
mods.notDownloaded: This mod hasn't been downloaded yet. Download it from the Mod Library first.
mods.versionMismatch: Version mismatch — will auto-sync on next start.
mods.incompatible: This mod may not be designed for dedicated servers.
mods.noDownloadedMods: No downloaded mods in the library yet

steam.title: Steam Account

status.notConfigured: No Steam account configured. Sign in before downloading mods.
status.needLogin: Sign in to Steam to download mods.

steam.guardHint: Check your email for the code, or open the Steam Mobile Authenticator.
steam.confirmOnPhone: This account needs approval in the Steam Mobile app — open your phone and confirm the login (waiting for confirmation…).
steam.passwordNotStored: The password is used only for this sign-in and is never stored by this tool (not in the database or logs).

webApiKey.label: Steam Web API Key
webApiKey.placeholder: Paste your Steam Web API Key
webApiKey.hint: Used for Workshop search. Get one free at steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey.

workshop.title: Workshop Mod Search
workshop.empty: No mods found. Try a different search term.
workshop.noKey: Configure a Steam Web API Key above to enable Workshop search.

deps.title: Missing required mods detected
deps.hint: This mod declares the following Steam-layer dependencies that are not yet in this server's mod list.

errors.noKey: Steam Web API Key not configured. Fill it in the Steam account section.
errors.steamError: Workshop request failed. Check whether the API Key is valid or try again later.

BaseCampMaxNum.label: Base camp total
BaseCampMaxNum.desc: Total number of bases across the server.

BaseCampMaxNumInGuild.label: Bases per guild
BaseCampMaxNumInGuild.desc: Maximum bases per guild (default 4, max 10). Higher raises load.

BaseCampWorkerMaxNum.label: Pals per base
BaseCampWorkerMaxNum.desc: Maximum Pals per base (max 50). Higher raises load.

ItemContainerForceMarkDirtyInterval.label: Container resync interval
ItemContainerForceMarkDirtyInterval.desc: How often to force re-sync while a container UI is open (seconds).

PhysicsActiveDropItemMaxNum.label: Physics drop item cap
PhysicsActiveDropItemMaxNum.desc: Maximum dropped items that can use physics behavior.

ServerReplicatePawnCullDistance.label: Pal sync distance
ServerReplicatePawnCullDistance.desc: Pal sync distance from players in cm (5000-15000).

AdminPassword.label: Admin password
AdminPassword.desc: Password used to obtain administrative privileges.

bAllowClientMod.label: Allow client mods
bAllowClientMod.desc: Allow players with mods enabled to join the server.

bEnableBuildingPlayerUIdDisplay.label: Show builder ID
bEnableBuildingPlayerUIdDisplay.desc: Display the creator's player ID on structures.

bIsShowJoinLeftMessage.label: Show join/leave messages
bIsShowJoinLeftMessage.desc: Show in-game messages when players join/leave.

ChatPostLimitPerMinute.label: Chat limit / min
ChatPostLimitPerMinute.desc: Maximum chat messages allowed per minute.

LogFormatType.label: Log format
LogFormatType.desc: Log output format: Text or Json.

PublicIP.label: Public IP
PublicIP.desc: Community server: explicit external public IP.

PublicPort.label: Public port
PublicPort.desc: Community server: explicit external public port.

RESTAPIPort.label: REST API port
RESTAPIPort.desc: Listening port for the REST API.

ServerPassword.label: Server password
ServerPassword.desc: Password required to log in to the server.

ServerPlayerMaxNum.label: Max players
ServerPlayerMaxNum.desc: Maximum number of players who can join.

AutoResetGuildTimeNoOnlinePlayers.label: Guild auto-reset time
AutoResetGuildTimeNoOnlinePlayers.desc: Offline hours before auto guild reset triggers.

bAllowEnhanceStat_Attack.label: Allow Attack points
bAllowEnhanceStat_Attack.desc: Allow allocating stat points to Attack.

bAllowEnhanceStat_Health.label: Allow HP points
bAllowEnhanceStat_Health.desc: Allow allocating stat points to HP.

bAllowEnhanceStat_Stamina.label: Allow Stamina points
bAllowEnhanceStat_Stamina.desc: Allow allocating stat points to Stamina.

bAllowEnhanceStat_Weight.label: Allow Weight points
bAllowEnhanceStat_Weight.desc: Allow allocating stat points to Carry Weight.

bAllowEnhanceStat_WorkSpeed.label: Allow WorkSpeed points
bAllowEnhanceStat_WorkSpeed.desc: Allow allocating stat points to Work Speed.

bAllowGlobalPalboxExport.label: Allow Palbox export
bAllowGlobalPalboxExport.desc: Allow saving to the Global Palbox.

bAllowGlobalPalboxImport.label: Allow Palbox import
bAllowGlobalPalboxImport.desc: Allow loading from the Global Palbox.

bAutoResetGuildNoOnlinePlayers.label: Auto-reset offline guild
bAutoResetGuildNoOnlinePlayers.desc: Auto-delete structures/base Pals if no member logs in.

bBuildAreaLimit.label: Build area limit
bBuildAreaLimit.desc: Prevent building near fast-travel points etc.

bCharacterRecreateInHardcore.label: Recreate in Hardcore
bCharacterRecreateInHardcore.desc: Allow recreating your character on death in Hardcore.

bDisplayPvPItemNumOnWorldMap_BaseCamp.label: Show PvP items (base)
bDisplayPvPItemNumOnWorldMap_BaseCamp.desc: Show PvP-exclusive item counts per base on the map.

bDisplayPvPItemNumOnWorldMap_Player.label: Show PvP items (player)
bDisplayPvPItemNumOnWorldMap_Player.desc: Show player locations and PvP item counts on the map.

bEnableFastTravelOnlyBaseCamp.label: Fast travel bases only
bEnableFastTravelOnlyBaseCamp.desc: Restrict fast travel to between bases only.

bExistPlayerAfterLogout.label: Sleep on logout
bExistPlayerAfterLogout.desc: Player enters sleeping state at location on logout.

bHardcore.label: Hardcore
bHardcore.desc: Enable Hardcore; no respawn on death.

bInvisibleOtherGuildBaseCampAreaFX.label: Hide base area FX
bInvisibleOtherGuildBaseCampAreaFX.desc: Toggle display of base area boundaries.

bIsRandomizerPalLevelRandom.label: Random Pal levels
bIsRandomizerPalLevelRandom.desc: Fully random wild Pal levels when enabled.

bIsStartLocationSelectByMap.label: Choose start location
bIsStartLocationSelectByMap.desc: Allow players to choose their starting location.

bShowPlayerList.label: Show player list
bShowPlayerList.desc: Enable the player list on the ESC menu.

VoiceChatMaxVolumeDistance.label: Voice max-volume dist
VoiceChatMaxVolumeDistance.desc: Distance where voice volume no longer attenuates.

VoiceChatZeroVolumeDistance.label: Voice zero-volume dist
VoiceChatZeroVolumeDistance.desc: Distance where voice volume becomes zero.

AdditionalDropItemNumWhenPlayerKillingIn.label: PvP kill drop count
AdditionalDropItemNumWhenPlayerKillingIn.desc: Quantity of the special PvP kill drop item.

AdditionalDropItemWhenPlayerKillingInPvP.label: PvP kill drop item
AdditionalDropItemWhenPlayerKillingInPvP.desc: Item ID dropped on PvP kill.

bAdditionalDropItemWhenPlayerKillingInPv.label: Drop on PvP kill
bAdditionalDropItemWhenPlayerKillingInPv.desc: Drop a special item when a player is killed in PvP.

DenyTechnologyList.label: Denied technologies
DenyTechnologyList.desc: Disable specific technologies by Technology ID.

PalAutoHpRegeneRateInSleep.label: Pal HP regen (sleep)
PalAutoHpRegeneRateInSleep.desc: Pal HP regen while sleeping multiplier.

PalEggDefaultHatchingTime.label: Egg hatch time
PalEggDefaultHatchingTime.desc: Time to hatch a Huge Egg (hours).

PlayerAutoHpRegeneRateInSleep.label: Player HP regen (sleep)
PlayerAutoHpRegeneRateInSleep.desc: Player HP regen while sleeping multiplier.

update.title: Software Update
update.upToDate: You are on the latest version

mirror.title: Download Mirror
mirror.label: GitHub download mirror prefix
mirror.placeholder: e.g. https://ghproxy.com (leave blank to connect directly)
